tools.name: host_status
tools.title: Server host status
tools.description: Read the current status of the Ubuntu host running the stack: hostname, OS, uptime, CPU %, memory %, load average, and per-disk usage. No personal data.

tools.name: service_versions
tools.title: Media stack service versions
tools.description: List the current and latest available versions of the tracked self-hosted services (Plex, Immich, qBittorrent), and whether each is up to date.
